problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
mechanism: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion
hypothesis: If Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion is applied to prevented, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
